name: social-downloader-monorepo
description: Monorepo: Next.js frontend + NestJS backend for social media downloader

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=apps/frontend && npm install --workspace=apps/backend
